text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Um, thanks for everything you did for me last
year! And... uh...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...I forgot the rest! Heehee!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, Happy New Year! Let's have a great year
together!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right, so what are we supposed to do now?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: "Resolution"? What's that?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Resolution... resolution... Oh! Like revolution!
Yeah, sure, I'll take someone down!
choice_data_list:
You just need to come up with a goal for the
new year.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, a goal! I've got one of those!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I wanna run and get first place a lot!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, I think so too! "Keep it silly, Sally!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's right! Isn't that what I said?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But, you know, running a lot is easy. Winning is a
lot harder.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So please figure out what I should do to win more!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You're my running coach, so you're my winning coach, too! Heh. Whaddaya think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What should Haru Urara do to achieve her goal?
choice_data_list:
Use your fighting spirit to overcome your
weaknesses!

Come up with your own original killer
technique!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hm... Weaknesses, eh? Like what?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Bleeeeh! Why do I gotta study?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can't even remember a phrase like "keep it
simple, stupid" correctly, her studying skills must
be abysmal... As her trainer, I have to make sure
she trains not just her body, but her mind as well!
choice_data_list: What's important is keeping a fighting spirit!
What's important is keeping a fighting spirit!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: A fighting spirit! Is it really that strong?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Strong enough to wipe out all my shortcomings?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Then, then...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So as long as I have a fighting spirit, I can do
anything?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I hear you loud and clear, Trainer! I'm gonna
catch a whole bunch of fighting spirits!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Come to me, fighting spirits! And get in my
belly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Haru Urara focuses her fighting spirit
on studying. Whether she gets anything out of her
study session other than fighting spirit... is
anyone's guess.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh. I need to sleep? But I already sleep a lot,
you know?
choice_data_list: Then you need to sleep even more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the start of the new year, so getting enough
rest means she'll be healthy the rest of the year.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I get it now! I gotta fight my former self!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! It's time to battle myself!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna sleep more than ever before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Haru Urara takes a long nap and gives
her body a rest.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: My own original killer technique?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Th-that sounds... so cool! I want one! I want one!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do it! Okay, let's see...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Something like: Haru Urara's CARROT LOVE!
Haru Urara's FIRST PLACE TAKER!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? They sound cool, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! What's your killer technique?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you have a super-duper amazingly
awesome one, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you can tell me! I promise I won't tell
anyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we spend the entire day coming up
with Haru Urara's killer technique. I'm sure there
was some benefit to it...
